meaning: n.穆罕默德言行录(现已成为古兰经的一个补充)
examples: If our predecessors understood the hadith the way some of us try to understand it, they would have never produced the great scholars who invented algorithms and developed trigonometry.
Proponents of nearly all varieties of Islamic legal thinking--mu'tazila, ahl-al-hadith, and usuli alike--found intellectual homes in Al Azhar.
Significantly, the "Ankara School" of theologians working on the new Hadith have been using Western critical techniques and philosophy.
But with Saudi money, and in the guise of Wahhabism, the ahl-al-hadith have of late won the upper hand.
